message:
test(storage): queue saturation stress tests for WBQ and coalescer (br-15dv.9.4)

Six new tests proving correctness under burst load:
- wbq_burst_200_ops_no_data_loss: burst 200 ops, verify all drained
- wbq_burst_500_ops_backpressure_metrics: larger burst, peak depth tracking
- wbq_concurrent_burst_from_multiple_threads: 8 threads x 50 ops each
- coalescer_batching_efficiency_under_burst: 100 enqueues < 50 commits
- wbq_zero_sync_fallbacks_under_normal_burst: no fallbacks below capacity
- wbq_autonomous_drain_completes_within_timeout: drain loop processes
  without explicit flush within 10s

All tests use delta-based assertions to be safe with the global WBQ
shared across parallel test threads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
